# Roadmap

## Planning assumptions

Fixture workspaces mirror the docs contract used in real repositories.

## Delivery model and priorities

Prioritize contract coverage and source-switching realism over narrative depth.

## MVP

### Business goal

Stale And Broken coverage for mvp.

### Scope

Version README, feature docs, packet docs, and synced JSON indexes for mvp.

### Milestones

- Generate mvp workspace content.

### Dependencies

- scripts/generate-dev-fixtures.mjs

### Exit criteria

- mvp docs can be loaded by the viewer.

## V1

### Business goal

Stale And Broken coverage for v1.

### Scope

Version README, feature docs, packet docs, and synced JSON indexes for v1.

### Milestones

- Generate v1 workspace content.

### Dependencies

- scripts/generate-dev-fixtures.mjs

### Exit criteria

- v1 docs can be loaded by the viewer.

## V2

### Business goal

Stale And Broken coverage for v2.

### Scope

Version README, feature docs, packet docs, and synced JSON indexes for v2.

### Milestones

- Generate v2 workspace content.

### Dependencies

- scripts/generate-dev-fixtures.mjs

### Exit criteria

- v2 docs can be loaded by the viewer.

## Cross-version dependencies

Shared packet rendering and metadata parsing rules apply to every version.

## Resource and risk notes

Generated fixture data must stay small enough to commit but large enough to stress the viewer.

## Open questions

None.
